name: Performance - High Load Ticket Verification
description: Measures the system's response time and stability when processing a high volume of concurrent /api/assistant/verify_ticket requests.
input: Simultaneous POST requests (e.g., 100-200) to /api/assistant/verify_ticket with valid ticket data.
output: Aggregate statistics: average response time, error rate, and throughput.
success_criteria: Average response time per request is below 2 seconds
No resource exhaustion or crashes occur
